calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225.
Douglas Dukelow, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Spencer Ward, who was not present.
No appearance by defendant Waldron Duffy, Inc.

Default entered against defendant on 04/26/04.
Order granting plaintiff's for waiver of appearance at default prove-up hearing - 02/26/08.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Spencer Ward, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Waldron Duffy, Inc. as follows:
Damages/Principal - $343,416.00, plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined by the Court.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
